Misheard words · Spanish listening
← All workouts
0 / 6 drills

Spoken Spanish runs words together. Medijoque. Aversi. Keseso. Each drill plays a real phrase at full speed and gives you 15 seconds to name the piece your ear misheard. The traps you miss come back in later drills.

First Alarm
0 / 10 alarms
Phrase openers · Spanish in, English out

The opening words carry the whole sentence. Viajaría is not viajaré. Solíamos is not solemos. Each alarm plays only the start of a phrase and you rebuild what it means in English, word by word, from a scrambled bank. Five seconds per word, and a wrong tap costs five.
